options.--threshold: --threshold <THRESHOLD> Jaccard similarity threshold (0.0-1.0) over normalized token shingles. Breaking change from the old percent-based, line-oriented threshold: 0.85 means 85% of 5-token shingles are shared, not that 85% of lines match. Values below 0.5 are clamped to 0.5 [default: 0.85]
